latestPost.text: Switching to @Android just got even easier with a new native migration experience built directly into Android 17. You’ll be able to transfer photos, videos, contacts, messages, and calendars wirelessly from an iPhone without downloading a separate app. You can also transfer newly supported data like your Google Account, passwords, Wi-Fi credentials, and eSIM.
